summary: Validated the 3 follow-up changes on CAVI frontend. All 3 features pass: (1) Login & Signup password show/hide eye toggles correctly flip input type=password<->text, (2) Admin View Key modal opens with decrypted 64-char hex private key, Copy & Close buttons present and functional, (3) Wallet deposit flow on /app/wallets correctly updates wallet-deposit-ETH to $500, wallet-status-ETH switches to 'Funded', and Overview page reflects Balance=$500 / Deposit Base=$500.
critical_code_review_comments: AdminPanel.js is ~440 lines and mixes 6 admin tabs + key modal in a single component; consider splitting into tab-level subcomponents for maintainability.
Login.js exports AuthShell from the same module that Signup.js imports — minor circular-style coupling; acceptable but a shared layout file would be cleaner.
WalletsPage.js generateWallet error path swallows the underlying error message (only generic toast); surface server validation errors for easier debugging.
test_credentials: Superadmin: superadmin@cavi.io / Cavi@Admin2025. Test user created at runtime: test_deposit_<ts>@test.com / pass1234.
seed_data_creation: Created one normal user via signup and one ETH wallet with a $500 deposit (used by both the deposit test and is now viewable as a fresh wallet entry in the admin Deposits & Wallets table).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration_1 covered backend fully (100%). Iteration_2 covered the 3 targeted frontend changes (password toggles on Login/Signup, Admin View Key modal, Wallets deposit reflecting on wallet card and Overview). All 5 sub-checks passed. Web3 wallet login is intentionally NOT tested (headless not possible). The admin Deposits & Wallets table currently has 6+ wallets including the freshly created test user — usable for further admin testing.
rca of the issue: n/a — no issues found in this iteration.
